task_completion.description: Page 1 is titled 'Market Equilibrium' and contains an X/Y graph with axes labeled 'Price' and 'Quantity'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in ActivInspire with the title 'Market Equilibrium', a vertical axis labeled 'Price', and a horizontal axis labeled 'Quantity'.

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains intersecting 'Supply' and 'Demand' curves with the intersection labeled 'Equilibrium'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two intersecting lines/curves on Page 1 labeled 'Supply' and 'Demand', with the point where they cross explicitly labeled 'Equilibrium'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 is titled 'Increase in Demand' and contains an X/Y graph with axes labeled 'Price' and 'Quantity', and a Supply curve.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second page in ActivInspire titled 'Increase in Demand', with Price/Quantity axes and a single curve representing Supply.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains two Demand curves showing a rightward shift, an arrow indicating the shift direction, and a text label mentioning 'Shift' or 'Increase'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two demand curves on Page 2 with an arrow pointing to the right between them, and text containing the word 'Shift' or 'Increase'.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved as 'supply_demand_lesson.flipchart' in the /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog or the application window title bar showing the filename 'supply_demand_lesson.flipchart' being saved to the Documents/Flipcharts folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent interacting with the ActivInspire application window, using its tools (pen, text, shapes) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The graphs and text were created using ActivInspire tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of drawing lines and typing text within the application, rather than importing a pre-made image of the graphs.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save As' dialog box in ActivInspire being used to specify the filename and directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires a 2-page flipchart in ActivInspire. Page 1 must have title 'Market Equilibrium', axes labeled 'Price' and 'Quantity', intersecting 'Supply' and 'Demand' curves, and intersection labeled 'Equilibrium' (minimum 4 drawn lines). Page 2 must have title 'Increase in Demand', Price/Quantity axes, a Supply curve, two Demand curves showing a rightward shift, an arrow indicating the shift, and a text label mentioning 'Shift' or 'Increase' (minimum 5 drawn lines). The file must be saved as 'supply_demand_lesson.flipchart' in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts.
